calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and one Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioners Jin Hui Wu and Shun Qin Huang were present in pro per as Guardians ad litem for the minor Yuhua Wu.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.
Allen Li was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Karen Shunqin Huang.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Amy Yuhua Wu.

Decree Changing Names of an Adult and one Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
